---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen

## Use Case
Describe when this feature would be useful

**Example scenario:**
- When users need to...
- Being able to... would be very helpful

## Proposed Solution
If you have ideas on implementation, describe them here

## Alternatives
Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups here
